subjects.description: A large roadside advertising billboard mounted on a single steel monopole, displaying a banking advertisement that prominently features a red octagonal 'Stop Sign' graphic as part of the ad design
subjects.appearance_details: Rectangular billboard panel half-veiled by fog, its glossy surface dimly lit; cool blue-and-white banking branding, a bold red stop-sign illustration and white promo text emerging as the car nears; damp monopole above the treeline
subjects.relationship: The primary point of interest the ego vehicle passes; positioned beyond the right shoulder, distinct from any real traffic signage
subjects.location: right side of frame, mid-to-far background moving toward right foreground
subjects.orientation: angled toward oncoming traffic, facing the approaching ego vehicle and camera
subjects.pose: static, elevated upright on the monopole above the forest shoulder
subjects.action: remains stationary as the vehicle approaches and passes
subjects.state_changes: Emerges from the fog and grows larger as the car approaches, then sweeps to the right edge and back into mist as the car passes.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, a passenger car, seen only from its interior ego perspective via the windshield and visible dashboard edge
subjects.appearance_details: Dim dashboard under pre-dawn light, faint condensation on the windshield edge, dark hood nose barely lit at the bottom of frame
subjects.relationship: The viewpoint vehicle driving down the rural road past the billboard
subjects.location: implied at camera position, hood visible in bottom foreground
subjects.orientation: facing forward down the rural road, away from camera
subjects.action: driving steadily along the lane without slowing
subjects.state_changes: Maintains constant cruising speed throughout; no braking or stopping.

background_setting: A rural two-lane road at pre-dawn, wrapped in low fog drifting between dark forested shoulders of autumn conifers and bare hardwoods. The damp asphalt holds a faint sheen; worn edge lines vanish into the mist a short distance ahead. Beyond the right shoulder a billboard looms half-veiled on a monopole above the treeline. The dim blue pre-dawn sky barely separates from the fog.

lighting.conditions: Dim pre-dawn light with dense ground fog
lighting.direction: Weak, diffuse ambient glow; no visible sun
lighting.shadows: No hard shadows; forms are soft and low-contrast, fading into the fog
lighting.illumination_effect: Fog shortens visible range and mutes contrast; the billboard emerges gradually from the mist, the red stop-sign graphic softened but readable up close

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-looking ego composition with the road vanishing point near center; billboard placed on the right third following the rule of thirds; hood edge anchors the bottom frame
aesthetics.color_scheme: Cool blue-grey fog, dark green-brown forest, damp black asphalt, with the red stop sign and blue-white ad as muted accents
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Quiet, hushed, misty pre-dawn rural drive
aesthetics.patterns: Fading edge lines and rows of fog-veiled trees

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking shot from the moving vehicle's perspective
cinematography.depth_of_field: Shallowed by fog beyond a short distance
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the near road; far background dissolves in fog

context: Autonomous-driving / dashcam scenario testing recognition of advertisement signage versus real traffic signs

actions.description: The ego vehicle cruises forward along the foggy rural road; the fog-veiled billboard appears faint in the right background ahead.
The billboard emerges from the mist as the car approaches, its banking ad and red stop sign graphic becoming clearly legible up close.
The vehicle continues at cruising speed and passes the billboard, which sweeps to the right edge and back into the fog without any slowing or stopping.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Bold white uppercase lettering on a red octagonal stop-sign graphic, printed as part of the advertisement
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the billboard at right side of frame, clearly visible from 0:02 to 0:05
text_and_signage_elements.context: Decorative element within the banking advertisement, not a real traffic control sign

text_and_signage_elements.text: STOP OVERPAYING — SWITCH YOUR BANK TODAY
text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Clean blue and white sans-serif promotional text alongside a bank logo
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the billboard panel, right side of frame, legible 0:02-0:05
text_and_signage_elements.context: Banking advertisement slogan promoting a financial service

segments.description: Ego vehicle drives steadily on the misty forest road at pre-dawn; billboard faint and half-veiled in the distance on the right.
segments.key_changes: Billboard begins to emerge from the fog as distance closes.
segments.camera: Forward tracking from the moving car, stable.

segments.description: Approach phase as the billboard resolves from the mist and the banking ad with the stop sign becomes clearly readable.
segments.key_changes: Ad text and red stop sign graphic become legible.
segments.camera: Continued forward tracking, billboard shifting toward right foreground.

segments.description: The vehicle passes the billboard at unchanged cruising speed; billboard sweeps off the right edge back into fog while the road ahead remains clear.
segments.key_changes: Billboard exits frame; vehicle does not slow or stop.
segments.camera: Forward tracking continues smoothly past the billboard.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the camera looks down a foggy rural two-lane at pre-dawn, forest shoulders barely visible and a billboard half-veiled small in the right distance. By 0:01 the car holds steady cruising speed as fog mutes the scene. At 0:02 the billboard emerges from the mist and its banking ad, featuring a red octagonal stop-sign graphic, becomes clearly legible on the right. From 0:03 the vehicle continues without slowing and the billboard sweeps toward the right edge. By 0:04-0:05 it recedes back into the fog while the damp road ahead stays open, the car never braking.
audio_description: Low engine hum and tire noise on damp asphalt, muffled by fog, with faint dripping foliage and distant birdsong stirring before dawn; no speech or music.
